intro: Exploring the frontier of nanoscale materials — from design and synthesis to real-world applications in electronics, energy, and memory technologies.

areas.title: Nanomaterials & Nanoscience
areas.desc: Design, synthesis, and characterization of nanoscale materials with unique physical and chemical properties.

areas.title: Electronic Materials & Memory Devices
areas.desc: Advanced materials for electronic components and next-generation memory technologies.

areas.title: Sustainable Electronics & Energy
areas.desc: Materials for sustainable and energy-efficient electronic technologies.

areas.title: Interdisciplinary Materials Science
areas.desc: Chemistry, physics, and materials science combined to develop advanced functional materials.
